nasb.text: ‘Not one of these men, this evil generation, shall see the good land which I swore to give your fathers,

esv.text: ‘Not one of these men of this evil generation shall see the good land that I swore to give to your fathers,

cnv.text: ‘這個邪惡世代的人，連一個也不能看見我起誓應許賜給他們列祖的美地；

ccb.text: ‘这邪恶的一代没有一人能看见我起誓要赐给他们祖先的佳美之地，
